description: A customer has set up a geofence around their home. They receive an alert when their teenage driver takes the car outside the set boundary.

nodes.task_description: The system detects the vehicle has crossed the pre-defined geofence boundary.

expected_outcome.value: The system's location monitoring service triggers an event.

nodes.task_description: Send an automated notification (SMS or push notification) to the primary account holder.

expected_outcome.value: The system successfully sends an alert to the customer's phone.

nodes.task_description: Log the event in the vehicle's location history.

expected_outcome.value: The geofence breach event is logged with a timestamp and location.
